name: spotify-to-apple-music
title: Spotify to Apple Music
description: Copy the current Spotify track URI and open the matching song in Apple Music.
author: StepanKuzmin

commands.name: open-current-track
commands.title: Open Current Song in Apple Music
commands.subtitle: Spotify
commands.description: Copy the current Spotify track URI and open the matching song in Apple Music.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
